id: #   pages 1-6 to check for anything missed; ignore pages 7-13. (Eval scores tool output for pp.1-6.)

text: Provide cleaning services for the office at 4 Melville St Edinburgh per the detailed specification
notes: core service; full task list in Appendix 1

text: Keep risk assessment and COSHH manuals up to date and on site
Carry out quality assurance checks of the work done and keep records
Be aware of and comply with the confidentiality requirements of section 19 of the SPSO Act
Tender submission must include a detailed response to the Project Specification (areas to be cleaned and frequency)
Tender submission must include details of the bidder's experience of similar work and proposed personnel
Tender submission must include a breakdown of costs (per person per hour, consumables, total cost incl VAT)
Tender submission must include summaries of work for two referenceable clients with contact details
Tender submission must state payment requirements (e.g. monthly invoice/payment periods)
Tender submission must state the standard terms of the contract regarding termination
The preferred bidder may be asked to provide professional indemnity or public liability insurance before award
Suppliers must meet their own costs of responding to this tender
Prices quoted must be held firm for at least 45 days from the closing date
The supplier must be willing for the tender response to form part of the contractual relationship
If costs are not fixed for the contract duration, the review points and basis of review must be clearly detailed
A full response must be submitted by email or by post (hard copy / CD) to the named address
Tenders must arrive no later than 12:00 noon on 06/11/2013
notes: submission deadline — late tenders not considered (gating)

text: Submission must be clearly marked "Response to Cleaning Tender"
notes: so it isn't opened before the deadline

text: The tender must substantially conform to the tender requirements, or it will not be considered further
notes: the pass/fail conformance gate — the disqualifier
